incorrects.description: Student clicked a wrong category on first attempt

steps.text: Look at where the top of the Monkeys bar ends.

incorrects.description: Student clicked a wrong category on second attempt

steps.text: Let's think about this together. Find the Monkeys bar. The HEIGHT of that bar shows how many monkeys there are.

incorrects.description: Student clicked a wrong category three or more times — system models the answer

params.description: Horizontal line draws from top of Monkeys bar perpendicular to vertical axis. Value 7 highlights on axis.

steps.text: This is tricky, so let me show you. The Monkeys bar goes up to 7 on the axis. The HEIGHT of the bar tells us there are 7 monkeys. Click the Monkeys bar.
